content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(1, 6, 0), (5, 8, 0), (0, 8, 4), (7, 9, 4), (3, 8, 8), (6, 9, 8), (0, 4, 9), (3, 9, 9), (6, 8, 10), (1, 3, 15), (2, 8, 16), (2, 3, 17), (3, 7, 17)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 0 exactly at time 9.

First, we will go through each edge and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (1, 6, 0) has node 1 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (5, 8, 0) has node 5 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 8, 4) has node 0 and time 4. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (7, 9, 4) has node 7 and time 4. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 8, 8) has node 3 and time 8. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (6, 9, 8) has node 6 and time 8. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 4, 9) has node 0 and time 9. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (3, 9, 9) has node 3 and time 9. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (6, 8, 10) has node 6 and time 10. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 3, 15) has node 1 and time 15. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (2, 8, 16) has node 2 and time 16. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (2, 3, 17) has node 2 and time 17. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (3, 7, 17) has node 3 and time 17. -> Add node 7.

Now we have collected all the nodes that are linked with node 0 exactly at time 9.

Answer: [8, 9, 4, 3, 6, 10, 7, 15, 16, 17]
